name: Greek-Style Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds green beans, tipped and tailed
1 red bell pepper, seeded and sliced
14 Greek-style olives, drain pit and halve
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large quantity of salted water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the green beans and blanch for 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Drain the beans, refresh under cold water, and drain again. This can be done up to 4 days in advance.
4. In a skillet, heat the butter until it begins to sizzle.
5. Add the garlic and red bell pepper; cook until the garlic turns golden, taking only about one minute or two. Be careful not to burn the garlic.
6. Add the blanched beans, olives, oregano, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Toss for about 2 minutes, ensuring the beans are heated through.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
